---
title: "Analytic Framework Scripts"
subtitle: "Analytic framework, cohort creation, and WIOA co-enrollment"
toc: true
number-sections: true
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  eval: false
---

# Analytic Framework

```{r echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
cat("```sql\n")
writeLines(readLines("data model scripts/analytic_frame_work.sql"))
cat("```\n")
```

# Create PROMIS Cohort

```{r echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
cat("```sql\n")
writeLines(readLines("data model scripts/create_promis_cohort.sql"))
cat("```\n")
```

# WIOA Co-Enrollment

```{r echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
cat("```sql\n")
writeLines(readLines("data model scripts/wioa_coenrollment.sql"))
cat("```\n")
```
